recommendations.title: Commission Third-Party Assurance for FY26 BRSR Filing
recommendations.description: Engage a third-party auditor to assure FY26 BRSR disclosures, including green hydrogen project details, to meet SEBI's 2026-05-30 deadline and avoid trading restrictions and increased cost of capital.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoid ₹10-20 Cr annual cost from 20-40bps higher cost of capital due to non-compliance
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Tata Power's assured BRSR filings supported green bond issuance

recommendations.title: Monitor Hydrogen Revenue and Regulatory Mandates Quarterly
recommendations.description: Establish quarterly monitoring of green hydrogen revenue and regulatory developments; escalate to board if revenue exceeds ₹50 Cr or binding hydrogen mandates with <24 months deadline are enacted.
recommendations.profitability_link: Enables timely green bond issuance capturing ₹500-1000 Cr funding opportunity at 25-50bps cost savings
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Tata Power's early monitoring enabled ₹5000 Cr green bond issuance

immediate_low.title: Commission Third-Party Assurance for FY26 BRSR Filing
Monitor Hydrogen Revenue and Regulatory Mandates Quarterly
